mapper.select: SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id
SELECT DISTINCT ON (backend_type, COALESCE(database_name, '')) * FROM disk_io_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY backend_type, COALESCE(database_name, ''), collected_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO disk_io_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, backend_type, object, context, reads, read_time, writes, write_time, writebacks, writeback_time, extend_count, extend_time, op_bytes, hits, evictions, reuses, fsyncs, fsync_time, database_name, blks_read, blks_hit, buffers_backend_fsync, buffers_checkpoint, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, stats_reset ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{backendType}, #{object}, #{context}, #{reads}, #{readTime}, #{writes}, #{writeTime}, #{writebacks}, #{writebackTime}, #{extendCount}, #{extendTime}, #{opBytes}, #{hits}, #{evictions}, #{reuses}, #{fsyncs}, #{fsyncTime}, #{databaseName}, #{blksRead}, #{blksHit}, #{buffersBackendFsync}, #{buffersCheckpoint}, #{buffersClean}, #{buffersBackend}, #{statsReset} )

INSERT INTO disk_io_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, backend_type, object, context, reads, read_time, writes, write_time, writebacks, writeback_time, extend_count, extend_time, op_bytes, hits, evictions, reuses, fsyncs, fsync_time, database_name, blks_read, blks_hit, buffers_backend_fsync, buffers_checkpoint, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, stats_reset ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.backendType}, #{item.object}, #{item.context}, #{item.reads}, #{item.readTime}, #{item.writes}, #{item.writeTime}, #{item.writebacks}, #{item.writebackTime}, #{item.extendCount}, #{item.extendTime}, #{item.opBytes}, #{item.hits}, #{item.evictions}, #{item.reuses}, #{item.fsyncs}, #{item.fsyncTime}, #{item.databaseName}, #{item.blksRead}, #{item.blksHit}, #{item.buffersBackendFsync}, #{item.buffersCheckpoint}, #{item.buffersClean}, #{item.buffersBackend}, #{item.statsReset} )

INSERT INTO disk_io_agg ( instance_id, collected_at, backend_type, delta_reads, delta_read_time, delta_writes, delta_write_time, delta_writebacks, delta_extend_count, delta_hits, delta_evictions, delta_fsyncs, delta_fsync_time, database_name, delta_blks_read, delta_blks_hit, buffer_hit_ratio, delta_buffers_backend_fsync, delta_buffers_checkpoint, delta_buffers_clean, delta_buffers_backend, backend_fsync_rate, avg_read_latency_ms, avg_write_latency_ms, read_write_ratio, cache_hit_ratio, status ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{backendType}, #{deltaReads}, #{deltaReadTime}, #{deltaWrites}, #{deltaWriteTime}, #{deltaWritebacks}, #{deltaExtendCount}, #{deltaHits}, #{deltaEvictions}, #{deltaFsyncs}, #{deltaFsyncTime}, #{databaseName}, #{deltaBlksRead}, #{deltaBlksHit}, #{bufferHitRatio}, #{deltaBuffersBackendFsync}, #{deltaBuffersCheckpoint}, #{deltaBuffersClean}, #{deltaBuffersBackend}, #{backendFsyncRate}, #{avgReadLatencyMs}, #{avgWriteLatencyMs}, #{readWriteRatio}, #{cacheHitRatio}, #{status} )

INSERT INTO disk_io_agg ( instance_id, collected_at, backend_type, database_name, delta_reads, delta_read_time, delta_writes, delta_write_time, delta_writebacks, delta_extend_count, delta_hits, delta_evictions, delta_fsyncs, delta_fsync_time, delta_blks_read, delta_blks_hit, buffer_hit_ratio, delta_buffers_backend_fsync, delta_buffers_checkpoint, delta_buffers_clean, delta_buffers_backend, backend_fsync_rate, avg_read_latency_ms, avg_write_latency_ms, read_write_ratio, cache_hit_ratio, status ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.backendType}, #{item.databaseName}, #{item.deltaReads}, #{item.deltaReadTime}, #{item.deltaWrites}, #{item.deltaWriteTime}, #{item.deltaWritebacks}, #{item.deltaExtendCount}, #{item.deltaHits}, #{item.deltaEvictions}, #{item.deltaFsyncs}, #{item.deltaFsyncTime}, #{item.deltaBlksRead}, #{item.deltaBlksHit}, #{item.bufferHitRatio}, #{item.deltaBuffersBackendFsync}, #{item.deltaBuffersCheckpoint}, #{item.deltaBuffersClean}, #{item.deltaBuffersBackend}, #{item.backendFsyncRate}, #{item.avgReadLatencyMs}, #{item.avgWriteLatencyMs}, #{item.readWriteRatio}, #{item.cacheHitRatio}, #{item.status} )

INSERT INTO disk_io_agg_5m ( instance_id, collected_at, backend_type, avg_read_latency_ms, avg_write_latency_ms, avg_cache_hit_ratio, avg_buffer_hit_ratio, avg_backend_fsync_rate, avg_read_write_ratio, sum_delta_reads, sum_delta_writes, sum_delta_fsyncs, sum_delta_evictions, sum_delta_blks_read, sum_delta_blks_hit, sum_delta_buffers_checkpoint, sum_delta_buffers_clean, sum_delta_buffers_backend, sum_delta_buffers_backend_fsync, max_read_latency_ms, max_write_latency_ms, min_buffer_hit_ratio, status ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{backendType}, #{avgReadLatencyMs}, #{avgWriteLatencyMs}, #{avgCacheHitRatio}, #{avgBufferHitRatio}, #{avgBackendFsyncRate}, #{avgReadWriteRatio}, #{sumDeltaReads}, #{sumDeltaWrites}, #{sumDeltaFsyncs}, #{sumDeltaEvictions}, #{sumDeltaBlksRead}, #{sumDeltaBlksHit}, #{sumDeltaBuffersCheckpoint}, #{sumDeltaBuffersClean}, #{sumDeltaBuffersBackend}, #{sumDeltaBuffersBackendFsync}, #{maxReadLatencyMs}, #{maxWriteLatencyMs}, #{minBufferHitRatio}, #{status} )

INSERT INTO disk_io_agg_30m ( instance_id, collected_at, backend_type, avg_read_latency_ms, avg_write_latency_ms, avg_cache_hit_ratio, avg_buffer_hit_ratio, avg_backend_fsync_rate, avg_read_write_ratio, sum_delta_reads, sum_delta_writes, sum_delta_fsyncs, sum_delta_evictions, sum_delta_blks_read, sum_delta_blks_hit, sum_delta_buffers_checkpoint, sum_delta_buffers_clean, sum_delta_buffers_backend, sum_delta_buffers_backend_fsync, max_read_latency_ms, max_write_latency_ms, min_buffer_hit_ratio, status ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{backendType}, #{avgReadLatencyMs}, #{avgWriteLatencyMs}, #{avgCacheHitRatio}, #{avgBufferHitRatio}, #{avgBackendFsyncRate}, #{avgReadWriteRatio}, #{sumDeltaReads}, #{sumDeltaWrites}, #{sumDeltaFsyncs}, #{sumDeltaEvictions}, #{sumDeltaBlksRead}, #{sumDeltaBlksHit}, #{sumDeltaBuffersCheckpoint}, #{sumDeltaBuffersClean}, #{sumDeltaBuffersBackend}, #{sumDeltaBuffersBackendFsync}, #{maxReadLatencyMs}, #{maxWriteLatencyMs}, #{minBufferHitRatio}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads), 0) as total_reads, COALESCE(SUM(delta_writes), 0) as total_writes, COALESCE(AVG(cache_hit_ratio), 0) as avg_cache_hit_ratio FROM disk_io_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, backend_type, COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads + delta_writes), 0) as total_io FROM disk_io_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI'), collected_at, backend_type ORDER BY collected_at, backend_type

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, COALESCE(AVG(avg_read_latency_ms), 0) as read_latency, COALESCE(AVG(avg_write_latency_ms), 0) as write_latency FROM disk_io_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI'), collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads), 0) as reads, COALESCE(SUM(delta_writes), 0) as writes FROM disk_io_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI'), collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads), 0) as total_reads, COALESCE(SUM(delta_writes), 0) as total_writes, COALESCE(AVG(avg_read_latency_ms), 0) as avg_read_latency, COALESCE(AVG(avg_write_latency_ms), 0) as avg_write_latency, COALESCE(AVG(cache_hit_ratio), 0) as cache_hit_ratio FROM disk_io_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_read_latency_ms)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_read_latency, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_write_latency_ms)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_write_latency, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(cache_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2), 0) as cache_hit_ratio FROM disk_io_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads + delta_writes), 0) as total_iops, COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(delta_blks_read + delta_blks_hit) * 8.0 / 1024.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as throughput_mb FROM disk_io_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT time_bucket, backend_type, COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads + delta_writes), 0) as total_io FROM disk_io_agg_5m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket, backend_type ORDER BY time_bucket, backend_type

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_read_latency_ms)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_read_latency, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_write_latency_ms)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_write_latency, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(cache_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2), 0) as cache_hit_ratio FROM disk_io_agg_30m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads + delta_writes), 0) as total_iops, COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(delta_blks_read + delta_blks_hit) * 8.0 / 1024.0)::numeric, 2), 0) as throughput_mb FROM disk_io_agg_30m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT time_bucket, backend_type, COALESCE(SUM(delta_reads + delta_writes), 0) as total_io FROM disk_io_agg_30m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket, backend_type ORDER BY time_bucket, backend_type

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(delta_buffers_checkpoint), 0) as checkpoint_buffers, COALESCE(SUM(delta_buffers_clean), 0) as clean_buffers, COALESCE(SUM(delta_buffers_backend), 0) as backend_buffers FROM disk_io_agg_30m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(delta_fsyncs), 0) / 1800.0 as fsync_rate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(backend_fsync_rate)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_fsync_rate FROM disk_io_agg_30m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

SELECT time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blks_read), 0) as physical_reads, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blks_hit), 0) as cache_hits, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(buffer_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2), 0) as buffer_hit_ratio FROM disk_io_agg_30m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND time_bucket BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH fsync_aggregated AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY fsync_rate DESC) as rank_num, collected_at, backend_type, COALESCE(SUM(delta_fsyncs), 0) / 60.0 as fsync_rate, COALESCE(SUM(delta_buffers_backend_fsync), 0) as backend_fsync_buffers, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_write_latency_ms)::numeric, 2), 0) as avg_write_latency, CASE WHEN SUM(delta_fsyncs) / 60.0 > 100 THEN '위험' WHEN SUM(delta_fsyncs) / 60.0 > 50 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END as status FROM disk_io_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY collected_at, backend_type ) SELECT rank_num, collected_at, backend_type, fsync_rate, backend_fsync_buffers, avg_write_latency, status FROM fsync_aggregated
AND status IN
#{status}
ORDER BY fsync_rate DESC LIMIT 20

WITH cache_hit_aggregated AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cache_hit_ratio ASC) as rank_num, collected_at, backend_type, database_name, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(cache_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2), 0) as cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(buffer_hit_ratio)::numeric, 2), 0) as buffer_hit_ratio, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blks_read), 0) as physical_reads, COALESCE(SUM(delta_blks_hit), 0) as cache_hits, CASE WHEN AVG(cache_hit_ratio) < 85 THEN '위험' WHEN AVG(cache_hit_ratio) < 95 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END as status FROM disk_io_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY collected_at, backend_type, database_name ) SELECT rank_num, collected_at, backend_type, database_name, cache_hit_ratio, buffer_hit_ratio, physical_reads, cache_hits, status FROM cache_hit_aggregated
AND status IN
#{status}
ORDER BY cache_hit_ratio ASC LIMIT 20
